footer.tagline: Villa in Marrakech — secure residence with caretaker, heated pool, tree-filled 2,600 m² garden. Experience Marrakech differently.
footer.address: RÉSIDENCE OLIVERAIE DE CHRIFIA, Marrakech, 40000, Morocco

home.metaDescription: 4-suite villa in Marrakech, each with a bathroom and WC. Secure residence with on-site caretaker. Heated pool (14×4 m), tree-filled 2,600 m² garden, breakfast, Atlas views. 6 km airport, Beldi. Book now.
home.heroSubtitle: Villa in Marrakech — secure residence with caretaker, heated pool. Near Beldi Country Club — experience Marrakech differently at Villa Loulou.
home.accrocheText: Villa Loulou welcomes you to a secure residence with an on-site caretaker: a villa with character, a 2,600 m² garden and Atlas views. Four suites (each with a bathroom and WC), a heated private pool (14 × 4 m) and everything for a comfortable stay — breakfast on site, housekeeping, and a team at your service 24/7.
home.accrocheDisclaimer: For the peace and quiet of the residence, children under 12 are not accepted.
home.temoignage1Text: We had an absolutely wonderful stay at this villa! Julian was an extraordinary host — attentive, friendly and always making sure everything went smoothly from start to finish. A special mention to Rashida, who made us feel completely at home. She was always available, warm and welcoming, which made such a difference, especially for the children, who felt at ease right away. The villa itself is immaculate, beautifully maintained and perfectly set up for a relaxing stay. Communication was smooth throughout, and every small request was handled quickly. We couldn't have asked for a better experience and highly recommend this villa to anyone looking for comfort, hospitality and peace of mind.
home.temoignage2Intro: Lovely villa, spacious, clean and beautiful.
home.temoignage2Text: It was spacious, modern and clean. Plenty of space for the whole family. Lots of privacy. The lady, Rachida, who lived at the country house, cleaned the house every day, made the beds and also prepared breakfast. A dear lady, but she didn't speak English. With Google Translate we managed. Contact with the host was also good. We also had a number of pet tortoises and the neighbours' cats came to visit us every day.

laVilla.metaDescription: Villa Loulou: secure residence with caretaker, 4 suites (each with a bathroom and WC), heated pool (14×4 m), tree-filled 2,600 m² garden. Marrakech, Atlas views, near Beldi Country Club.
laVilla.bannerTitle: The Villa — A villa with character in the heart of Marrakech
laVilla.presentationText: Villa Loulou is a charming villa in Marrakech, located in a secure residence with an on-site caretaker, equipped with 4 suites, each with a bathroom and WC, heated private pool, tree-filled garden (2,600 m²) and terrace. Atlas views, a stone's throw from Beldi Country Club. Ideal for families.
laVilla.equipExterior1: Heated private outdoor pool (14 × 4 m) with electric roller shutters
laVilla.equipInterior3: 1 living room · 1 kitchen · 4 suites, each with a bathroom and WC

nosServices.metaDescription: Included and extra services: breakfast, housekeeping, heated pool (14×4 m), tree-filled 2,600 m² garden, cook, airport shuttle, wellness (massage, facials, nail care). Secure residence with caretaker. Villa Loulou Marrakech.
nosServices.pageSubtitle: Everything is designed so that your stay at the villa is a moment of relaxation and comfort.
nosServices.inclusPoolDesc: Heated private outdoor pool (14 × 4 m) — at your disposal during your stay.
nosServices.inclusMaidDesc: Housekeeping service included in your stay.
nosServices.supplementCartDesc: Grocery management available at extra cost.
nosServices.supplementBienEtreDesc: Massage, facials and nail care on request, at extra cost (advance booking).
nosServices.experienceText: Between the pool, breakfast on the terrace and moments of relaxation in the garden, Villa Loulou offers a privileged setting for family or friends holidays. The on-site team ensures your comfort and is at your disposal to arrange airport shuttle, meals or groceries according to your wishes.
nosServices.faq1A: Yes, breakfast is served on site and included in your stay.
nosServices.faq2A: Yes, an airport shuttle is available on request at extra cost.
nosServices.faq3Q: Can I book a chef at the villa?
nosServices.faq3A: Yes, our cook can prepare your meals on request (additional charge).
nosServices.faq4Q: Is the villa close to the Medina?
nosServices.faq4A: Jemaa el-Fna Square is about 8.3 km away. Ideal for a taxi or car trip.
nosServices.faq5A: Yes, free WiFi is available throughout the villa.
nosServices.faq6Q: How much does a taxi cost from the villa to the airport or Jemaa el-Fna?

legal.privacyMetaDescription: Privacy policy and personal data protection for Villa Loulou Marrakech website.
legal.privacyIntro: This policy describes how Villa Loulou collects and processes the personal data you provide to us, in particular via the contact form.
legal.privacyResponsableP1: The data controller is: [Same identification as the site publisher — see
legal.privacyDonneesP: Via the contact form, we may collect: name, email address, phone number, preferred stay dates, number of guests and the content of your message. This data is provided voluntarily by you.
legal.privacyFinaliteP: This data is used only to respond to your requests (quotes, booking, questions) and, where applicable, to manage your stay. Processing is based on your consent (submitting the form) and on pre-contractual or contractual measures.
legal.privacyDureeP: Data is retained for as long as necessary to process your request, then for a reasonable period for legal and accounting obligations (e.g. 3 years from last contact, unless a longer legal obligation applies).
legal.privacyDestinatairesP: Data is intended only for the site owner and persons authorised to process requests (villa management, bookings). It is not sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacyDroitsP1: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and, where applicable, to restrict processing and to data portability. You may also object to processing or withdraw your consent. To exercise these rights or for any questions, contact us at the address given in the
legal.privacyDroitsP2: . You have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (or the supervisory authority in your country).
legal.privacySecuriteP: We implement technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration.
legal.privacyModificationsP: This policy may be updated. The last update date will be indicated below. We invite you to consult it regularly.
